title: Bordered Ores
description: Adds borders to all ores to enhance their visibility.
body:
# Bordered Ores
Adds clear borders around all ore blocks, making them easier to spot while mining. This simple enhancement improves visibility without altering the original look of the ores, helping players locate valuable resources faster.

![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/545e8700cc42463e4ff80aac8708c8bb2c6f8811.png)
